title: Aesthetics of Destruction Music and the Worldview of Shinji
display_title: Aesthetics of Destruction Music and the Worldview of Shinji
wikitext:
[]: Aesthetics of Destruction: Music and the Worldview of Shinji             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 18, 2012 1:42 pm Gwern posted this over on the EML and it's kind of long so I haven't made my way through it yet but it looks kind of interesting: "Aesthetics of Destruction: Music and the Worldview of Shinji Ikari in 'Neon Genesis Evangelion'" by Heike Hoffer for this 2012 master's thesis for the school of music at the University of Arizona.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Tue Jun 19, 2012 9:06 am My discussion: http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2012-June/007195.html

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 19, 2012 4:20 pm ...and I thought I wrote a lot about this show....

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Jun 19, 2012 11:05 pm It's nice to see that Evageeks is mentioned in the introduction. I wonder if this could be linked in someway in the theory and analysis section of the wiki?

Article: Aesthetics of Destruction Music and the Worldview of Shinji
[]: Aesthetics of Destruction: Music and the Worldview of Shinji             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 18, 2012 1:42 pm Gwern posted this over on the EML and it's kind of long so I haven't made my way through it yet but it looks kind of interesting: "Aesthetics of Destruction: Music and the Worldview of Shinji Ikari in 'Neon Genesis Evangelion'" by Heike Hoffer for this 2012 master's thesis for the school of music at the University of Arizona.
